newsSince: No hard contract/order news since June 9. Allient is exhibiting at Automate 2026 (Jun 22-25, Chicago), showcasing frameless torque and axial-flux (ElectroFlux/MegaFlux/SA Series) motors targeted at humanoid platforms plus an integrated IPC controller + Pyxmos servo ecosystem. This is product/visibility reinforcement of the humanoid-actuation thesis, not a disclosed design win; the +11% move reflects rising humanoid sentiment.

verdicts.rankRationale: Humanoid-stack lens, actuation purity. Automate 2026 reinforces explicit humanoid motor content (frameless/axial-flux + integrated ecosystem), incrementally strengthening the actuation thesis, but no contract disclosed. Slight positive; rank vs robotics peers holds.
verdicts.bull: Clean US-listed motion-control supplier with explicit humanoid actuator content (frameless/axial-flux) and an integrating controller/servo ecosystem.
verdicts.neutral: Real humanoid-relevant product showcase, but revenue still skews to legacy motion/automation; humanoid is optionality.
verdicts.bear: +74% YTD prices in humanoid hope ahead of hard orders; visibility events aren't design wins.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: A named humanoid OEM actuator design win or volume supply agreement.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Humanoid demand slips to out-years while valuation already reflects the narrative.
